decisions.description: Daniel moves to pipeline support from April 7th for two weeks
decisions.context: To support Marcus's team with the pipeline work

decisions.description: Company details section in signup made optional, moved to post-signup
decisions.context: Based on user research and feedback, to improve user onboarding experience

decisions.description: Migrate push notifications to Firebase Cloud Messaging
decisions.context: Due to the current provider's deprecation of their SDK and reliability issues

decisions.description: Go with organization Apple Developer account
decisions.context: For long-term benefits, despite requiring a DUNS number

decisions.description: James to enforce branch protection on GitHub
decisions.context: To prevent direct pushes to the main branch and ensure code review

action_items.what: Sync with James to onboard Daniel
Pair with Aisha to validate auth fix on staging
Merge and deploy auth service fix
Update design spec for optional company details in signup
Update wireframes for optional company details flow
CC Rachel from QA on maintenance notice
Document incident pattern for branch protection retrospective
Enforce branch protection rules on GitHub
Start Firebase Cloud Messaging migration plan
Loop in QA on iOS deep link fix
Write spec for Excel export feature
Scope lightweight shared workspaces feature for Q3
Follow up with marketing on brand guidelines
Escalate production log access request to DevOps
Start DUNS number application for organization Apple Developer account

summary: The Q3 product and engineering sync meeting discussed the roadmap, engineering capacity, design system updates, customer feedback, and cross-team blockers. Key decisions included migrating push notifications to Firebase Cloud Messaging, making the company details section in signup optional, and enforcing branch protection on GitHub. Action items were assigned to team members, with deadlines ranging from April 4 to April 20.
